name: roguelike-destiny-system
title: Implement the automated destiny roguelike system as described in docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-03-roguelike-destiny-automation-design.md and 2026-04-03-roguelike-destiny-rules-and-mapping.md. This includes: 7-tier Sect Risk Policy system, Destiny Amplifier Tags, Destiny Seed/Stage system for characters, Dark Current system, Auto-recruit scoring, Core disciple identification, Auto-cultivation direction, Auto-equip scoring, Auto-expedition policy bias, Destiny progression rules, Risk level system, Policy switch shock mechanics, Heaven's Mark system, and UI changes for SectPage and CharactersPage.
creator: zhaobaolong
